summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tealor Mode landing page optimization focusing on copy changes, typography improvements, and conversion flow functionality

ui_bugs.issue: Email input width (266px) slightly narrow on mobile viewport

passed_tests: Hero title simplified to 'El sistema para eliminar grasa rebelde'
Email capture title updated to 'Accede al sistema que realmente funciona'
Email input placeholder set to 'Tu email'
Value cards display without descriptions (only titles)
Brand positioning shows 'datos, consistencia y decisiones correctas'
CTA button variations: 'Acceder al sistema', 'Empezar ahora', 'Entrar al sistema'
All CTA buttons scroll to email form correctly
Thank you page displays after submission with proper messaging
Typography improvements visible (Inter font, letter-spacing, font-weights)
Mobile responsive design maintained and functional
All interactive elements functional and clickable
Social links functional with valid URLs
